name: Lattice Cookies
description: Crispy butter cookies with a beautiful lattice pattern. Made with premium flour and natural vanilla. Perfect with morning coffee.

name: Berry Croissant
description: Flaky buttery croissant topped with fresh raspberries and blackberries. Filled with light vanilla cream. Baked fresh every morning.

name: Grain Baguette
description: Classic French baguette with a crunchy crust and soft interior. Made with whole grain flour and natural sourdough starter.

name: Sourdough Round
description: Traditional round sourdough bread with a thick crust. Slow fermented for 24 hours for maximum flavor and nutrition.

name: Honey Pie
description: Golden honey pie cut into perfect triangles. Made with natural honey, walnuts and fragrant spices. A true Eastern delight.

name: Sesame Bun
description: Soft round bun generously coated with black and white sesame seeds. Slightly sweet dough with a golden crust.
